word: H3433 - יָשֻׁבִי לֶחֶם - Yâshubîy Lechem - yaw-shoo-bee' leh'-khem - Jashubi-lehem

sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׁבי לחם ישׁבי לחם

Transliteration: yâshûbı̂y lechem yôshebêy lechem

Phonetic: yaw-shoo-bee' leh'-khem

BDB Definition:

Jashubi-lehem = "returner of bread"
  1. a descendant of Shelah, the son of Judah by Bath-shua the Canaanitess

Origin: from H7725 and H3899

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
